summary: A defining moment for the society on the national stage. Our delegation delivered an outstanding performance across multiple divisions, bringing home two championship titles and marking one of the strongest campaigns in our history.

Building on previous successes, the society continued its national presence with strong performances in debating, public speaking, and adjudication, demonstrating the depth and versatility of our members.
Another strong showing at Nigeria's premier university debating championship, with the society advancing deep into the competition across both the Open and Novice divisions.
The momentum continued with another memorable outing that produced finalists, top adjudication performances, and several speaker awards, reinforcing the society's consistency on the national circuit.
